zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Saward於大約1552年出生在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德時，他的父親Thomas Saward23歲，母親Joan Archer18歲。他於大約1577年與Rachell Saward在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1605年在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Saward于大约1552年出生在英国英格兰艾可塔可泰德时，他的父亲Thomas Saward23岁，母亲Joan Archer18岁。他于大约1577年与Rachell Saward在英国英格兰艾可塔可泰德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1605年在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可塔可泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Saward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seward
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Saward was born about 1552, in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Saward, was 23 and his mother, Joan Archer, was 18. He married Rachell Saward about 1577, in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1605, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Saward est né environ 1552, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Saward, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Archer, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Rachell Saward environ 1577, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1605, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Saward um 1552 in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Saward 23 und seine Mutter Joan Archer 18. Er hat um 1577 in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom Rachell Saward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1605 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Saward è nato il circa 1552 nel Thaxted, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Saward, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Joan Archer, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Rachell Saward circa 1577, nel Thaxted, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1605, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Thaxted, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Sawardが約1552年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサクステドで生まれた時，父Thomas Sawardは23歳，母Joan Archerは18歳であった。約1577年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサクステドでRachell Sawardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1605年に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスサクステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward(이)가 대략 1552년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Saward(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Archer(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1577년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에서 Rachell Saward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1605년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Saward nasceu aproximadamente 1552, em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Saward, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Archer, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Rachell Saward aproximadamente 1577, em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1605, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Saward родился около 1552 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Saward было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Archer, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachell Saward около 1577 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1605 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Saward nació aproximadamente 1552, en Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Saward, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joan Archer, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Rachell Saward aproximadamente 1577, en Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1605, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
